nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: West Peruvian dove
nodes.summary: West Peruvian dove（West Peruvian dove，学名 Zenaida meloda），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于城市公园。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 城市公园
nodes.summary: 城市公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括West Peruvian dove，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also readily found in human-altered habitats such as croplands, irrigated valleys, city parks and gardens, and urban areas. thumb|A West Peruvian dove resting on a wooden rail in a garden, in Elqui River|Valle del Elqui, northern Chile. It is well-suited to colonizing new areas, and West Peruvian doves have been expanding their range further southwards since the 1990s, with records in northwest Argentina suggesting they can successfully cross the Andes

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: West Peruvian dove 属于目 鸽形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: West Peruvian dove 属于科 鸠鸽科。

links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 中的 order / order_cn 与 family / family_cn 字段补充。
